Notes for Somadrita

01
You're my favourite everything 🌹
You are the reason I smile for no reason and believe in magic. Not just my girlfriend — my favourite person in the entire universe.
02
A little flirty truth ✨
If being beautiful was a crime, you'd be serving a life sentence — and I'd happily be guilty of falling for you every single day.
03
What I love most 💌
Your laugh is my favourite sound. Your eyes are my favourite view. Your presence is my favourite feeling — always and completely.
04
Happy birthday, gorgeous 🦋
The world absolutely needed you in it. And lucky for me, you walked into mine. Today is all yours — your smile, your light, your magic.
05
My late-night truth 🌙
On nights I can't sleep, I think about how lucky I am to know someone like you. Beautiful in ways no camera can ever fully capture.
06
The honest truth 💫
You ruin every other place for me — because nowhere feels as good as wherever you are. That's the quiet, real power you hold over me.
Every second brings me closer to celebrating

The one who lights up every room

Simply Somadrita

"There is no filter in the world that could make you more beautiful than you already are." 🌸

You are someone truly rare — and I am the luckiest person alive.

💝

"My dearest Somadrita, on this beautiful day the world gave us you —

You are the best thing that has ever walked into my life. You make me want to be better, laugh louder, and love deeper every single day.

You are my calm on hard days and my greatest joy on good ones. Your smile, your eyes, your heart — my favourite things in the world.

Today is entirely yours. May it overflow with everything your beautiful heart deserves.

Happy birthday, my love. Every year with you is a gift I will never take for granted." 🌹

Forever yours, always 💕
